description_long: This is a delicate porcelain teacup with a matching saucer, both adorned with a vibrant floral pattern featuring pink and red flowers with green leaves. The rim and base of the cup, as well as the edge of the saucer, are accented with a thin band of gold, adding an elegant touch. The cup has a gently flared shape and a distinct, angular handle that is also trimmed in gold. The floral motif is distributed evenly around the cup, creating a continuous decorative effect. The saucer is slightly concave to securely hold the cup and shares the same floral and gold detailing. The overall appearance is refined and classic, suitable for formal tea settings or decorative display.
description: A porcelain teacup and saucer set with pink floral patterns and gold trim, featuring an angular handle and elegant detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the floral pattern and gold rim, with the handle not visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angular handle and the floral design wrapping around the cup.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the gold-trimmed seam and continuous floral motif, with the handle directly opposite.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the handle fully visible and the floral pattern extending across the cup and saucer.
